item.title: PASTEL DE CHOCLO INGREDIENTS For the Pino: 680g (1.5 lbs) grou...
item.description:
PASTEL DE CHOCLO INGREDIENTS For the Pino: 680g (1.5 lbs) ground beef 2 tbsp neutral oil / beef tallow 1 onion 4 garlic cloves 2 tsp cumin 2 tsp paprika 1 tsp salt 1 tbsp flour For the Layers: 1 chicken breast or 2 roasted chicken thighs 1/2 onion 1 Bay leaf A few garlic cloves 4 hard boiled eggs 1/2 cup black olives 1/4-1/2 cup raisins For the Corn Topping: 4 cups yellow corn kernels (fresh or frozen) 3/4 cup heavy cream 2 tbsp unsalted butter 2 tbsp fresh basil Good pinch of salt For Finishing: Sugar for sprinkling over the top before baking
#pastel
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED
